name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual categorization causes cash flow gaps. We convert raw bank transaction data into categorized cash flow reports instead of manual categorization using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in categorizing cash flow from raw bank transactions.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in categorizing cash flow from raw bank transactions.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual categorization causes cash flow gaps. We convert raw bank transaction data into categorized cash flow reports instead of manual categorization using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual categorization causes cash flow gaps. We convert raw bank transaction data into categorized cash flow reports instead of manual categorization using spreadsheets.
